job_title: 2026 Asset Wealth Management Machine Learning Engineer - Summer Associate
job_nlp_title: Asset Wealth Management Machine Learning Engineer - Summer Associate
job_location: 575 Washington Blvd, Jersey City, NJ, 07310, US
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Natural Language Processing, Large Language Models, Python, Machine Learning Libraries, Frameworks
skill_match_scores: Natural Language Processing:1.0, Large Language Models:1.0, Python:1.0, Machine Learning Libraries:1.0, Frameworks:0.0
must_have_quals: Advanced degree in Data Science, Computer Science, or Machine Learning, Proven experience in natural language processing and working with large language models, Proficiency in programming languages such as Python and familiarity with machine learning libraries and frameworks, Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment, Strong analytical skills with an understanding of financial markets and asset management
core_responsibilities: Design, deploy and manage prompt-based models on LLMs for various NLP tasks in the financial services domain, Conduct research on prompt engineering techniques to improve the performance of prompt-based models within the financial services field, exploring and utilizing LLM orchestration and agentic AI libraries, Build comprehensive testing setups to evaluate model performance and ensure efficacy and reliability, Collaborate with engineering teams to deliver high-quality, scalable solutions, Study scientific articles and research papers to identify emerging techniques and discover new approaches
job_summary: JPMorganChase, one of the oldest financial institutions, offers innovative financial solutions to millions of consumers and businesses. As an Asset Wealth Management Machine Learning Engineer - Summer Associate, you will apply advanced NLP and AI techniques to generate actionable insights from large-scale financial data and support data-driven investment decisions.
